property.name: java.library.path
property.value: C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-26\bin;C:\Windows\Sun\Java\bin;C:\Windows\system32;C:\Windows;C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-26\bin;C:\Windows\system32;C:\Windows;C:\Windows\System32\Wbem;C:\Windows\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\Windows\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\FSD\FSD2\;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\Program Files\Microsoft SQL Server\170\Tools\Binn\;C:\Program Files\Microsoft SQL Server\Client SDK\ODBC\170\Tools\Binn\;C:\Program Files\dotnet\;C:\Users\Jeet\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python313\Scripts\;C:\Users\Jeet\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python313\;C:\Users\Jeet\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Users\Jeet\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code\bin;C:\Users\Jeet\AppData\Roaming\npm;C:\Users\Jeet\AppData\Local\Programs\Antigravity\bin;C:\Users\Jeet\.dotnet\tools;.

testcase.name: testDepositAndTransfer

error.message: Unresolved compilation problem: The method findByUserId(int, Connection) in the type AccountDAO is not applicable for the arguments (int)

testcase.error:
